name: Stage Deli's Cheese Blintzes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees F.
2. In a blender, blend wrapper batter ingredients and let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Melt half of the unsalted butter in an 8-inch skillet (preferably nonstick) over moderately high heat.
4. Pour enough batter into the skillet to coat the bottom. Cook, undisturbed, until the top is set and the bottom is golden. Do not turn the wrapper over. Transfer the wrapper to paper towels in one layer, with the golden side down.
5. Make more wrappers with the remaining butter and batter.
6. In a food processor, blend cheeses, sugar, and cinnamon until smooth. If necessary, add flour to thicken the filling.
7. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
8. Put 3 tablespoons of filling in the center of each wrapper and fold opposite sides over the filling until they barely touch. Fold in the ends to completely enclose the filling, forming packets. Place the seam-side down on the baking sheet.
9. Make more blintzes with the remaining filling and wrappers.
10. Bake the blintzes, covered loosely with foil, until heated through (5 to 10 minutes).
